LocaleResource.Name: Plugins.FriendlyName.Smartstore.Stripe.Pix
LocaleResource.Value: Stripe PIX

LocaleResource.Name: Plugins.Description.Smartstore.Stripe.Pix
LocaleResource.Value: Extends the store with Stripe PIX payment.

LocaleResource.Name: Plugins.FriendlyName.Payments.StripeElements.Pix
LocaleResource.Value: Pay now with Stripe PIX

LocaleResource.Name: Plugins.Description.Payments.StripeElements.Pix
LocaleResource.Value: Generate an QR Code for PIX payment with Stripe.

LocaleResource.Name: AdminInstruction
LocaleResource.Value:
To set up Stripe:

  • Create an account with Stripe or log in with your existing account.
  • Navigate to Developer / API Key.
  • Copy the Publishable Key and the Secret Key below into the fields provided.
  • Now add a new endpoint by clicking the Create Webhook button.

LocaleResource.Name: CookieInfo
LocaleResource.Value: Stripe uses cookies to display and process the payment transaction.

LocaleResource.Name: Copied
LocaleResource.Value: PIX Code copied.

LocaleResource.Name: PublicApiKey
LocaleResource.Value: Public API Key

LocaleResource.Name: PublicApiKey.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enter the public API key here, which can be viewed in the Stripe dashboard.

LocaleResource.Name: SecrectApiKey
LocaleResource.Value: Secret API Key

LocaleResource.Name: SecrectApiKey.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enter the secret API key here, which can be viewed in the Stripe dashboard.

LocaleResource.Name: WebhookSecret
LocaleResource.Value: Webhook Secret Key

LocaleResource.Name: WebhookSecret.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enter the secret key for the webhook here.

LocaleResource.Name: WebhookUrl
LocaleResource.Value: Endpoint URL

LocaleResource.Name: WebhookUrl.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Store this URL in your Stripe account as the endpoint URL for the webhook.

LocaleResource.Name: CreateWebhook
LocaleResource.Value: Create webhook

LocaleResource.Name: AdditionalFee
LocaleResource.Value: Additional fee

LocaleResource.Name: AdditionalFee.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enter additional fee to charge your customers.

LocaleResource.Name: AdditionalFeePercentage
LocaleResource.Value: Additional fee. Use percentage

LocaleResource.Name: AdditionalFeePercentage.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Specifies whether to apply a additional percentage fee to the order total. If not enabled, a fixed value is used.

LocaleResource.Name: ShowButtonInMiniShoppingCart
LocaleResource.Value: Show button in mini shopping cart

LocaleResource.Name: ShowButtonInMiniShoppingCart.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Specifies whether to show the checkout button in the mini shopping cart.

LocaleResource.Name: PaymentInfo
LocaleResource.Value: After completing the order you will be redirected to an external payment provider if necessary, where you can make the payment for your order.

LocaleResource.Name: OrderNotFound
LocaleResource.Value: The order with the PaymentIntent-Id {0} was not found.

LocaleResource.Name: ExpiresAt
LocaleResource.Value: Payment expires at: {0}.

LocaleResource.Name: PayWithPix
LocaleResource.Value: Pague com PIX.

LocaleResource.Name: CopyPaste
LocaleResource.Value: PIX Code to copy and paste.

LocaleResource.Name: WaitingConfirmation
LocaleResource.Value: Waiting for payment confirmation.
